INVALID_QUESTION.fires_on: request body missing question field OR question not a string

CHAT_QUOTA_EXHAUSTED.fires_on: this calendar month's per-tier quota is exhausted

INTERNAL_ERROR.fires_on: unexpected error in chat engine path

cache_contract.rationale: Chat answers are LLM-synthesized — replaying the same answer for 24h saves repeat-call cost without staling (knowledge bundle is the source of truth and the underlying search results are themselves 1h-cached). HTTP cache disabled so downstream proxies don't share answers across api_keys.

consumers: Cursor IDE / Claude Code / Claude Desktop MCP clients asking 'how do I' questions
embedded help widgets on landing pages
drift_check_command: curl -fsS -X POST https://api.algovault.com/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"how do I get a BTC trade signal"}' | jq -e 'has("question") and has("answer") and has("citations") and has("model") and has("_algovault") and (has("usage") | not) and (has("prompt_tokens") | not) and (has("outcome_return_pct") | not) and (has("system_prompt") | not)' > /dev/null && echo DRIFT_CHECK_OK || echo DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL
